## ✅ Admission Tests

### Regular
- [ ] Cannot drop default wooden sword
- [ ] Cannot break own bed
- [ ] Cannot remove armor
- [ ] Can break player-placed blocks
- [ ] Cannot place blocks in team-spawn region
- [ ] Cannot damage shopkeepers
- [ ] Shopkeepers immune to Silverfishes/Iron Golems
- [ ] Cannot be targeted by own Silverfishes/Iron Golems
- [ ] Shopkeepers immune to Explosions

### Console
- [ ] No errors when placing TNT
- [ ] No errors when respawning players
- [ ] No errors on server startup
- [ ] No errors during regular match

### Visual
- [ ] TNT Spoil shows RED particles above head
- [ ] Team upgrades announced in chat
- [ ] Invisible to others during respawn phase

### Blast Protection
- [ ] Regular Glass is blast-resistant
- [ ] Colored Glass is blast-resistant
- [ ] Obsidian is blast-resistant
- [ ] Endstone (Fireball) resists blasts
- [ ] Wool covered with Glass or Stained Glass does not explode
